name: Plushie Maze
description:
CW!!: Plushophillia, Somnophillia, possible Hypnosis, possible Safe Vore

You awaken in an unusual maze after taking a little nap. Tired and sleepy, this heavily padded maze seems endless and keen on keeping you around for naps. Currently have made 6 plushie types, 4 main level, 2 underlayer. Let me know if you have any suggestions for more!
creator: Tonii789
